quoteFirst: Next day, Tuesday, the twelfth, I started off with a party of men (we were fourteen in all) to see a prairie; returned to St. Louis
quoteLast: on the thirteenth; attended a soirée and ball--not a dinner--given in my honor that night; and yesterday afternoon at four o'clock we turned our faces homewards.
